title: iOS MOBILE APP compatibility with **mirror subitem sum** columns and formula columns in which the **formula includes mirror columns**
excerpt: Mirror subitem sum columns and formula columns that include mirror columns within the formula were supported in the iOS mobile app before the most recent software update (17.6.1 on August 7, 2024). Since this update, the…

posts.author: lbradywvus (Lisa Brady)
posts.cookedHtml: Mirror subitem sum columns and formula columns that include mirror columns within the formula were supported in the iOS mobile app before the most recent software update (17.6.1 on August 7, 2024). Since this update, the formulas work in the desktop app and web. The cells appear empty in the mobile app. I’ve only had compatibility/visibility (so far) in CARD widgets.
